goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand the codebase layout
Find relevant source files related to the resort's website or booking system
Search for specific content like configuration or marketing-related code
Verify that all required search tools are properly installed and accessible

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and detail-oriented, but not technically trained. Prefers clear, organized information and wants to understand the big picture before diving into specifics.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands business and hospitality well but has limited technical knowledge. Does not know programming languages, tool names, or code search methodologies. Will need explanations in plain language.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, found relevant files, and verified that the search tools are working properly to support their digital marketing needs.
